title: Update LangGraph runner to query SQLite
description: Update MAP_System/langgraph/runner.py to load task and agent state from map.db instead of workflow/task_graph.json and agents/status.json. The runner should remain read-only by default; --record-event should write to the events table in SQLite as well as events.jsonl.
acceptance_criteria: Runner loads tasks and agent status from map.db when the database exists
Falls back to JSON files if map.db is absent (backward compatibility)
ready_tasks, blocked_tasks, done_task_ids, available_agents reflect SQLite state
--record-event writes to SQLite events table in addition to events.jsonl
